text:

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    sysutils/tmux        Makefile distinfo 
  Log:
  - Update to 1.1

  - Replace pkg-plist with definition of PLIST_FILES, PORTDOCS and PORTEXAMPLES in Makefile
  
  PR:             ports/140323
  Submitted by:   Sahil Tandon <sahil@tandon.net>
